text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Hello, Sweep. How are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are you trying to say I look bad? In that
case, you should probably go get your eyes
checked!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're the same as ever, I see. Your smile's
so cute it's actually annoying.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
But once the race is over, I think you might be
crying in a cloud of my dust.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! That's a good one, coming from you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But there's no way you're gonna get to see me
sniffling.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna win this race and stand right at the top,
above all of you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And then I'm gonna smile the biggest smile you've
ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the final race of the Triple Tiara
tour—the Shuka Sho. The curtain's about to rise
on the final battle to become the star of the year!
